title: canthium valetonii
intro: Canthium valetonii, also known as the 'Koroyan' tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Madagascar and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues, fever, and wounds. The leaves and bark of the Canthium valetonii plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing.
